_publications._publicationTitle: Multiplatform molecular profiling uncovers two subgroups of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors with distinct therapeutic vulnerabilities.

_contextSnippet: In 75% of mice HSC1λ-gPTCH1 formed tumors in the flank, compared to 0% of mice injected with control parental HSC1λ-gGFP cells
details: HSC1λ-gPTCH1 formed tumors in 75% of mice, compared to 0% of control HSC1λ-gGFP cells
